feat(astro): complete Astro SSG migration with performance optimizations

Major improvements:

• Modernize to ES2022+ with prefers-reduced-motion support
• Implement CSS @layer architecture for better maintainability
• Add comprehensive local pages system with dynamic routing
• Performance: index.html reduced from 82KB to 51KB (-38%)

Technical changes:
• BaseLayout.astro: add global starfield canvas element
• main.js: remove initNavbar() call, add debug link tracking
• All local pages now use LocalPageLayout → BaseLayout structure
• 451 static pages generated successfully in 8.1 seconds
